text.title: Node.js Service Layer Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals from inputs to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml for nodejs-service-layer.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the feature have non-trivial business logic AND persistence AND service-level test target?

conclusion.verdict: SKIP — alternate framework owns the layering
SKIP — thin CRUD doesn't need layering
BLOCK — remove HTTP imports from service
BLOCK — move interfaces to consumer side
skip — preconditions in Applies-If not met

text.example: Orders feature + 6 ops + Drizzle + Fastify → first two branches do not match → no ORM in controller → no HTTP in service → controllers thin → consumer-side interfaces → APPROVE.
